adds.rationale: Opens engineered-biology exposure (a named next-wave bucket with zero current watchlist weight); DNA synthesis revenue growing 27% YoY on AI-enabled discovery demand signals buildup-phase entry.

news_evidence.summary: Twist Bioscience Q1 FY2026: revenue $103.7M up 17% YoY, DNA synthesis and protein solutions revenue $51.1M up 27% YoY driven by customers pursuing AI-enabled discovery; full-year FY2026 guide $435-440M (+16%).
Twist preliminary Q1 FY2026 revenue announcement confirming record quarter and AI-enabled discovery as growth driver.

removes.rationale: Nuclear bucket is over-concentrated at 4/12 with NUKZ duplicating URA's broad nuclear-ETF exposure; the SMR-data-center thesis is now widely priced in after the cluster of 2025-Q1-2026 hyperscaler PPAs, so we trim the most-redundant nuclear sleeve while keeping URA, CCJ, and LEU.

news_evidence.summary: Equinix finalized over 500 MW of nuclear PPAs with Stellaria, Radiant, and Oklo and launched 'Project Atomic Core' site assessments in February 2026 - a peak-enthusiasm signal that the SMR-data-center thesis is now consensus.
Meta-Oklo 1.2 GW Pike County Ohio nuclear campus announced January 2026 (16 Aurora reactors x 75 MW), with Meta prepaying for fuel - confirms that hyperscaler-nuclear is past the buildup phase.

rationale_overall: Final quarterly rebalance opens a position in the previously-empty engineered-biology bucket (TWST), funded by trimming the most-redundant of four nuclear sleeves (NUKZ overlaps URA).
